parsing_res_list.block_content:
Caterpillar in a hurry

Take your walk

To the shady leaf or stalk

Which may be the chosen spot

No toad spy you

-lovering bird of prey pass you

spin and die

-o live again a butterfly

markdown.text:
## 2. A Caterpillar and a Spider (Read aloud with actions)6.5.2.6 Caterpillar Brown and furry Caterpillar in a hurry Take your walk To the shady leaf or stalk Or what not Which may be the chosen spot No toad spy you -lovering bird of prey pass you spin and die -o live again a butterfly
Christina Rossetti
